Derived heuristically from company_name ETF/fund keywords; defaults to stock when no ETF marker is present.
Derived from asset_type plus market_cap bands: ETF -> us_etf, else large/mid/small-cap buckets.
Derived as trailing daily_bars row count up to the selected asof_date, capped at 20 sessions.
Derived as mean(close * volume) over trailing daily_bars rows up to the selected asof_date, capped at 20 sessions.
Current production workbook does not expose this 20-day microstructure feature; it must be added or derived from richer Databento/market-structure source data.
